label: 1529 CE
era_summary: Year 1529 (MDXXIX) was a common year starting on Friday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1529: France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1529: France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30; Algiers-Spain, 1529. Maddison records GDP/capita 1249 (ESP, 1529) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
